articles.title: LISTENING?
articles.summary: Unwrap's [5] customer intelligence platform brings all your customer feedback (surveys, reviews, support tickets, social comments, etc.) into a single view, then uses AI + NLP to surface the most actionable insights and deliver them straight to your inbox.

articles.title: HOW DOES AI IMPACT SKILL FORMATION?
articles.summary: AI slows learning per task but meaningfully increases output. Overall skill growth may remain intact if higher throughput offsets reduced depth.

articles.title: FORGET TECHNICAL DEBT
articles.summary: Technical debt is only one contributor to cognitive load, not the core problem itself. Improving software speed and stability requires addressing broader organizational, process, and human drivers that often outweigh technical debt and cause it to accumulate in the first place.

articles.title: PARKINSON'S LAW AND AI: DOES AI MEAN...MORE WORK?
I HATE FISH
articles.summary: Most productivity systems fail because their maintenance costs exceed their value. A deliberately hostile, minimal system that relentlessly prunes irrelevant tasks keeps focus on work that actually matters.

articles.title: MOZILLA PIONEERS - PRODUCT RESIDENCY APPLICATIONS LIVE
articles.summary: Ready to take a product from idea to launch? Mozilla Pioneers is a paid residency for builders developing AI and web products alongside Mozilla's New Products team. The program focuses on real execution, mentorship, and market readiness. Apply now through February 16th!

articles.title: A JTBD-FIRST PATTERN FOR AGENTIC TOOL SYSTEMS
articles.summary: Strong agentic systems start with a clearly defined job and a small set of task-oriented tools. Verification closes the loop, turning one-off execution into continuous improvement.

articles.title: LATENT SPACE ENGINEERING
articles.summary: Beyond context engineering, shaping an AI's mental frame can significantly improve results. Latent Space Engineering uses emotional, stylistic, and motivational cues to push agents into more effective modes of reasoning and execution.

articles.title: RETHINKING SLACK
articles.summary: Slack became too complex as features accumulated without a coherent information architecture. A dedicated redesign effort restored clarity and scalability through rapid prototyping, intensive customer testing, and deliberate rollout planning.

articles.title: CLOUDED JUDGEMENT 1.30.26 - SOFTWARE IS DEAD...AGAIN!
articles.summary: SaaS valuations are falling because AI is eroding confidence in long-term retention and terminal value. As software becomes cheaper to build, competition rises, and investors reprice risk across the sector.

articles.title: VIBE-CODING IS NOT NEED-FINDING
articles.summary: Vibe-coding makes it easy to build polished solutions to nonexistent problems.

articles.title: AI CHANGES THE BOTTLENECK FROM DELIVERY TO SOMETHING ELSE
articles.summary: AI makes it easier to ship faster, but speed has never been the bottleneck.
